purpose: ties the minted session, journal row, and inspect-first recovery rules into one compact proof

journal_fence.proof: claim generation and lease expiry fence stale workers before mutation

live_classification.proof: inspect reads the journal row and live hashes before classifying finish, rollback, retry, or block

blocked_when: fresh live hashes do not match the journaled target
the journal cannot prove a safe finish or rollback
the claim lease has expired and the worker is fenced

required_invariants: journal inspection is read-only and must happen before any mutating recovery
claim generation and lease expiry fence stale workers before mutation
inspect reads the journal row and live hashes before classifying finish, rollback, retry, or block
fresh live hashes are required before mutating recovery
stale dry-run evidence must not be promoted into recovery authority
